user_task_description: This PDF brief has consistent section labels but inconsistent body-paragraph styling.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Make the body paragraphs on page 1 use one consistent body style, while leaving the title and section labels unchanged.
atomic_scope: Only formatting consistency is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised PDF with normalized body-paragraph styling.

inspired_by.title: White text isn't white. Have to use pptx workaround to make it white?
Wobbly text when set at an angle slight angle using indesign

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- The styling drift looks partly intentional because different paragraphs use different emphasis systems
- The instruction targets body text only, not every text element on the page
- Visual consistency matters more than textual changes here
